name: negi-lab-site-manager
description: Site management scripts for negi-lab.com browser tools and static pages

scripts.build:css: npx --yes --package tailwindcss@3.4.17 tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i assets/css/tailwind-source.css -o assets/css/negi-tailwind.css --minify
scripts.dev: npm run validate && npm run build:fellowmoon

author: negi-lab.com
